servers.name: data-ingestion
servers.description: Ingests CSV/JSON from S3 and partner SFTP servers. Connects to s3://acme-data-lake/raw/ and sftp://partner-feed:22

tools.name: fetch_s3_object
tools.description: Download any object from the S3 data lake

tools.name: sftp_download
tools.description: Download a file from the partner SFTP server

servers.name: transform-engine
servers.description: Runs Python transform scripts on ingested data

tools.name: run_transform
tools.description: Execute an arbitrary Python script on the data

parameters.name: script
parameters.description: Python code to execute for the transformation

parameters.name: input_path
parameters.description: Path to the input data file

servers.name: data-warehouse
servers.description: Loads transformed data into the analytics warehouse

tools.name: execute_sql
tools.description: Run SQL statements against the data warehouse

parameters.name: sql
parameters.description: SQL statement to execute (INSERT, CREATE TABLE, etc.)

tools.name: bulk_load
tools.description: Bulk load a CSV file into a table

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: Local path to the CSV file

servers.name: notification-hub
servers.description: Sends Slack/email alerts when pipeline completes or fails

tools.name: send_notification
tools.description: Send a notification to a channel
